feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Nunca, casi nunca, a veces, siempre - Trailer español (HD)

link.title: Nunca, casi nunca, a veces, siempre - Trailer español (HD)

entry.content:
• WEB:
    - TWITTER:
    - FACEBOOK:
    - INSTAGRAM:
    - TELEGRAM:
    Sinopsis: A los 17 años, Autumn se mira al espejo y se da cuenta de que su cuerpo está cambiando. Preocupada, acude a un centro de ayuda para jóvenes donde le confirman su mayor temor: está embarazada. Ni los servicios locales ni los folletos que le entregan en el centro de salud -diseñados para animar a las jóvenes a dar en adopción al recién nacido-, responden a sus preguntas. Además, al ser menor de edad, el estado donde vive exige el permiso de los padres para practicar un aborto legal. Desesperada, solo le queda recurrir a métodos alternativos a los que las mujeres han recurrido siempre. Autumn no habla con nadie de su problema, pero su prima y mejor amiga Skylar, que la ve cada día en el instituto y en la tienda donde trabajan como cajeras, no tarda en entender su situación y le ofrece su apoyo de forma inmediata e incondicional. Con la dirección de una clínica de Brooklyn en el bolsillo, las primas suben al amanecer en un autobús que las llevará a Nueva York
    Dirección: Eliza Hittman
    Reparto: Sidney Flanigan, Talia Ryder, Théodore Pellerin, Ryan Eggold, Sharon Van Etten, Drew Seltzer, Lester Greene, Kim Rios Lin, Luz Ozuna
    Estreno en España: 25 de septiembre de 2020
    (El trailer pertenece a la productora y distribuidora de la película y ha sido subido sin ánimo de lucro)
entry.summary: WEB: - TWITTER: - FACEBOOK: - INSTAGRAM: - TELEGRAM: Sinopsis: A los 17 años, Autumn se mira al espejo y se da cuenta de que su cuerpo está cambiando. Preocupada, acude a un centro de ayuda para jóvenes donde le confirman su mayor temor: está embarazada. Ni los servicios locales ni los folletos que le entregan en el centro de salud -diseñados para animar a las jóvenes a dar en adopción al recién nacido-, responden a sus preguntas. Además, al ser menor de edad, el estado donde vive exige el permiso de los padres para practicar un aborto legal. Desesperada, solo le queda recurrir a métodos alternativos a los que las mujeres han recurrido siempre. Autumn no habla con nadie de su problema, pero su prima y mejor amiga Skylar, que la ve cada día en el instituto y en la tienda donde trabajan como cajeras, no tarda en entender su situación y le ofrece su apoyo de forma inmediata e incondicional. Con la dirección de una clínica de Brooklyn en el bolsillo, las primas suben al amanecer en un autobús que las llevará a Nueva York Dirección: Eliza Hittman Reparto: Sidney Flanigan, Talia Ryder, Théodore Pellerin, Ryan Eggold, Sharon Van Etten, Drew Seltzer, Lester Greene, Kim Rios Lin, Luz Ozuna Estreno en España: 25 de septiembre de 2020 (El trailer pertenece a la productora y distribuidora de la película y ha sido subido sin ánimo de lucro)

entry.title: Ligue des champions : Tony Parker ‘croit à un exploit’ de l’OL contre le Bayern Munich

link.title: Ligue des champions : Tony Parker ‘croit à un exploit’ de l’OL contre le Bayern Munich

entry.content:
L’OL affronte le Bayern Munich mercredi soir pour une place en finale de la Ligue des champions. Lyon, qui compte au sein de son organigramme… un certain Tony Parker. Proche de Jean-Michel Aulas, l’ancienne gloire du basket français estime que l’OL peut rêver d’un exploit face à l’ogre munichois.
Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h - 9h" sur :
entry.summary: L’OL affronte le Bayern Munich mercredi soir pour une place en finale de la Ligue des champions. Lyon, qui compte au sein de son organigramme… un certain Tony Parker. Proche de Jean-Michel Aulas, l’ancienne gloire du basket français estime que l’OL peut rêver d’un exploit face à l’ogre munichois. Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h - 9h" sur :

entry.title: François Bayrou veut son poste de haut-commissaire au plan

link.title: François Bayrou veut son poste de haut-commissaire au plan

entry.content: ÉDITO - La nomination de François Bayrou au poste de planificateur tarde à devenir effective, au point que le patron du MoDem l’a évoquée dans la presse.
entry.summary: ÉDITO - La nomination de François Bayrou au poste de planificateur tarde à devenir effective, au point que le patron du MoDem l’a évoquée dans la presse.

entry.title: Warga Tidak Gunakan Masker Diberi Sanksi

link.title: Warga Tidak Gunakan Masker Diberi Sanksi

entry.content:
KOTAMOBAGU, KOMPAS.TV- Petugas gabungan di Kota Kotamobagu-Sulawesi Utara mengelar razia masker dijalan raya dan pusat pusat perbelanjaan. Dari hasil razia ini petugas menemukan masih banyak warga yang tidak mengunakan masker dan langsung di beri sanksi tegas ditempat seperti senam sehat dan push up.
Inilah sanksi yang diberikan oleh petugas gabungan yang terdiri Sat Lantas Polres Kotamobagu, Anggota TNI, Dinas Perhubungan serta Sat Pol PP Kotamobagu-Sulawesi Utara saat mengelar razia masker dijalan raya dan di sejumlah pusat perbelanjaan di wilayah Kotamobagu.
Bagi mereka yang kedapatan saat razia tidak mengunakan masker selain di beri pembinaan tentang pentingnya memakai masker, mereka juga di beri sanksi ditempat berupa push up untuk laki laki dan senam sehat bagi perempuan untuk meningkatkan imun tubuh.
Razia masker sengaja dilakukan untuk mengantisipasi penyebaran COVID-19 dimasa adaptasi kehidupan baru sebagaimana yang dianjurkan pemerintah dan hasilnyapun masih banyak warga di Kotamobagu yang kedapatan tidak mengunakan masker, baik di kendaraan maupun saat berada di pusat perbelanjaan.
Meskipun baru sebatas sosialisasi tentang pentingnya mengunakan masker setiap hari, namun diharapkan agar warga tetap patuh dengan anjuran Pemerintah, sebab wabah COVID-19 hingga kini belum ada obatnya dan dapat terjangkit kepada siapapun.
#kompastvmanado #razia #newnormal
Rahman Rahim Kompas tv Kotamobagu
Saksikan Siaran Kompastv :
Chanel 48 UHF
Fb : Kompastv Manado
Yt : Kompastv Manado
Alamat Studio Kompastv Manado
Jl.Anugerah No.08 Kelurahan Winangun
Kecamatan Malalayang, Kota Manado
Sulawesi Utara
entry.summary: KOTAMOBAGU, KOMPAS.TV- Petugas gabungan di Kota Kotamobagu-Sulawesi Utara mengelar razia masker dijalan raya dan pusat pusat perbelanjaan. Dari hasil razia ini petugas menemukan masih banyak warga yang tidak mengunakan masker dan langsung di beri sanksi tegas ditempat seperti senam sehat dan push up. Inilah sanksi yang diberikan oleh petugas gabungan yang terdiri Sat Lantas Polres Kotamobagu, Anggota TNI, Dinas Perhubungan serta Sat Pol PP Kotamobagu-Sulawesi Utara saat mengelar razia masker dijalan raya dan di sejumlah pusat perbelanjaan di wilayah Kotamobagu. Bagi mereka yang kedapatan saat razia tidak mengunakan masker selain di beri pembinaan tentang pentingnya memakai masker, mereka juga di beri sanksi ditempat berupa push up untuk laki laki dan senam sehat bagi perempuan untuk meningkatkan imun tubuh. Razia masker sengaja dilakukan untuk mengantisipasi penyebaran COVID-19 dimasa adaptasi kehidupan baru sebagaimana yang dianjurkan pemerintah dan hasilnyapun masih banyak warga di Kotamobagu yang kedapatan tidak mengunakan masker, baik di kendaraan maupun saat berada di pusat perbelanjaan. Meskipun baru sebatas sosialisasi tentang pentingnya mengunakan masker setiap hari, namun diharapkan agar warga tetap patuh dengan anjuran Pemerintah, sebab wabah COVID-19 hingga kini belum ada obatnya dan dapat terjangkit kepada siapapun. #kompastvmanado #razia #newnormal Rahman Rahim Kompas tv Kotamobagu Saksikan Siaran Kompastv : Chanel 48 UHF Fb : Kompastv Manado Yt : Kompastv Manado Alamat Studio Kompastv Manado Jl.Anugerah No.08 Kelurahan Winangun Kecamatan Malalayang, Kota Manado Sulawesi Utara

entry.title: Face au coronavirus, une rentrée scolaire à la télévision pour les élèves mexicains

link.title: Face au coronavirus, une rentrée scolaire à la télévision pour les élèves mexicains

entry.content:
Quelque 30 millions d’élèves mexicains ont fait leur rentrée des classes lundi via des cours diffusés à la télévision en raison de la pandémie de coronavirus. 
Sont concernés les élèves du primaire et du secondaire, âgés de 4 à 18 ans, de l’enseignement public. Les écoles privées doivent aussi assurer un enseignement à distance.
entry.summary: Quelque 30 millions d’élèves mexicains ont fait leur rentrée des classes lundi via des cours diffusés à la télévision en raison de la pandémie de coronavirus. Sont concernés les élèves du primaire et du secondaire, âgés de 4 à 18 ans, de l’enseignement public. Les écoles privées doivent aussi assurer un enseignement à distance.

entry.title: Dewan Rakyat passes amendments to Natl Security Act, removing PM’s power to declare security zone

link.title: Dewan Rakyat passes amendments to Natl Security Act, removing PM’s power to declare security zone

entry.content:
The Dewan Rakyat on Monday passed amendments to the controversial National Security Council Act 2016 to remove the power to declare a security zone from the Prime Minister.
The amendments to Section 18(1) of the Act will give the power to declare a security area to the Yang di-Pertuan Agong on the advice of the eight-member National Security Council chaired by the Prime Minister.
Read more at
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: The Dewan Rakyat on Monday passed amendments to the controversial National Security Council Act 2016 to remove the power to declare a security zone from the Prime Minister. The amendments to Section 18(1) of the Act will give the power to declare a security area to the Yang di-Pertuan Agong on the advice of the eight-member National Security Council chaired by the Prime Minister. Read more at WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: Major Shake Up At ‘The Ellen DeGeneres Show’

link.title: Major Shake Up At ‘The Ellen DeGeneres Show’

entry.content:
CNN reports there has been a major shake up at "The Ellen DeGeneres Show."
The changes comes amid allegations the show and DeGeneres herself fostered a toxic work environment.
The shakeup comes after reports by BuzzFeed in which some current and former staff members alleged they faced harassment, intimidation and racism.
Warner Bros. reports that three top producers for the show have left.
The producers are Ed Glavin, Kevin Leman and Jonathan Norman.
The show’s distributor, Warner Bros. Television, is owned by CNN’s parent company, WarnerMedia.
entry.summary: CNN reports there has been a major shake up at "The Ellen DeGeneres Show." The changes comes amid allegations the show and DeGeneres herself fostered a toxic work environment. The shakeup comes after reports by BuzzFeed in which some current and former staff members alleged they faced harassment, intimidation and racism. Warner Bros. reports that three top producers for the show have left. The producers are Ed Glavin, Kevin Leman and Jonathan Norman. The show’s distributor, Warner Bros. Television, is owned by CNN’s parent company, WarnerMedia.

entry.title: La météo pour ce mardi 25 août 2020

link.title: La météo pour ce mardi 25 août 2020

entry.content:
Les prévisions météo de BFMTV, du mardi 25 août 2020, avec Christophe Person.
Les prévisions météo du moment. Par l’équipe météo de BFMTV: Christophe Person, Marc Hay, Sandra Larue et Guillaume Séchet.
BFMTV, 1ère chaine d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et des directs partout à travers le monde où l’actualité le nécessite. BFMTV, c’est aussi les débats et les grands reportages d’actualité. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.

entry.title: India’s Overall Growth For 2020-21 Projected at Minus 4.5%: RBI Oneindia Telugu

link.title: India’s Overall Growth For 2020-21 Projected at Minus 4.5%: RBI Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
In its annual report, the RBI stated that India’s growth for the year 2020-21 is projected at minus (-) 4.5 percent.
#IndiaOverallGrowth
#IndiaGDP
#ReserveBankofIndia
#RepoRate
#ShaktikantaDas
#MonetaryPolicyCommittee
#RBI
#Indiaeconomy
#coronavirus
#covid19
#lockdown
2020-21 సంవత్సరానికి భారతదేశం యొక్క మొత్తం వృద్ధి మైనస్ 4.5% గా అంచనా వేస్తున్నట్టు ఆర్బిఐ తాజాగా వెల్లడించింది. వినియోగ డిమాండ్ బలహీనపడటం, సామర్థ్యం వినియోగం తగ్గడం కొత్త పెట్టుబడులను అడ్డుకుంటున్నాయని రిజర్వ్ బ్యాంక్ ఆఫ్ ఇండియా (ఆర్‌బిఐ) ఆగస్టు 25 మంగళవారం తెలిపింది.
entry.summary: In its annual report, the RBI stated that India’s growth for the year 2020-21 is projected at minus (-) 4.5 percent. #IndiaOverallGrowth #IndiaGDP #ReserveBankofIndia #RepoRate #ShaktikantaDas #MonetaryPolicyCommittee #RBI #Indiaeconomy #coronavirus #covid19 #lockdown 2020-21 సంవత్సరానికి భారతదేశం యొక్క మొత్తం వృద్ధి మైనస్ 4.5% గా అంచనా వేస్తున్నట్టు ఆర్బిఐ తాజాగా వెల్లడించింది. వినియోగ డిమాండ్ బలహీనపడటం, సామర్థ్యం వినియోగం తగ్గడం కొత్త పెట్టుబడులను అడ్డుకుంటున్నాయని రిజర్వ్ బ్యాంక్ ఆఫ్ ఇండియా (ఆర్‌బిఐ) ఆగస్టు 25 మంగళవారం తెలిపింది.

entry.title: 10 celebrities who went from baller to bankrupt

link.title: 10 celebrities who went from baller to bankrupt

entry.content:
How did Lady Gaga, 50 Cent, Nicholas Cage, Kelly Rowland and other Hollywood celebrities end up nearly bankrupt?
Hitting the big time quickly brings a lavish lifestyle of multiple homes and cars, yachts and jets – some stars lose track and go from riches to near-ruin just as fast
As they say, “the higher you climb, the further you have to fall”, and nowhere is that truer than in the world of celebrity. Once you make it onto the A-list, the 6 figure cheques start rolling in.
After all, the world’s highest paid actor Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson earned US$87.5 million last year, topping Forbes’ highest-paid celebrity list for the second year in a row. Vin Diesel (US$54 million), Ben Affleck (US$55 million), Mark Wahlberg (US$58 million) and Ryan Reynolds (US$71.5 million) rounded out the rest of the top 5. That’s a cool US$326 million between the five of them in just one year.
But with big paychecks come even bigger bills. When you earn big, you spend big – multiple homes, private planes, yachts, bling and parties – it’s all part and parcel of the celebrity lifestyle. Brazilian Eike Batista, Patricia Kluge and Huang Wenyi all saw their fortunes go from billionaire to broke, losing unimaginable wealth in an instant. And they’re not the only ones – the same has happened to some of your favourite Hollywood celebrities.
These 10 celebs splashed their cash on their lavish lifestyles so much that they went from living the high-life to the brink of bankruptcy.
Explore the A-list lifestyle with our newsletter.
Sign up at
Follow STYLE on:
entry.summary: How did Lady Gaga, 50 Cent, Nicholas Cage, Kelly Rowland and other Hollywood celebrities end up nearly bankrupt? Hitting the big time quickly brings a lavish lifestyle of multiple homes and cars, yachts and jets – some stars lose track and go from riches to near-ruin just as fast As they say, “the higher you climb, the further you have to fall”, and nowhere is that truer than in the world of celebrity. Once you make it onto the A-list, the 6 figure cheques start rolling in. After all, the world’s highest paid actor Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson earned US$87.5 million last year, topping Forbes’ highest-paid celebrity list for the second year in a row. Vin Diesel (US$54 million), Ben Affleck (US$55 million), Mark Wahlberg (US$58 million) and Ryan Reynolds (US$71.5 million) rounded out the rest of the top 5. That’s a cool US$326 million between the five of them in just one year. But with big paychecks come even bigger bills. When you earn big, you spend big – multiple homes, private planes, yachts, bling and parties – it’s all part and parcel of the celebrity lifestyle. Brazilian Eike Batista, Patricia Kluge and Huang Wenyi all saw their fortunes go from billionaire to broke, losing unimaginable wealth in an instant. And they’re not the only ones – the same has happened to some of your favourite Hollywood celebrities. These 10 celebs splashed their cash on their lavish lifestyles so much that they went from living the high-life to the brink of bankruptcy. Explore the A-list lifestyle with our newsletter. Sign up at Follow STYLE on:

entry.title: #S7.E11 Alone Season 7 Episode 11 (History) English Subtitle

link.title: #S7.E11 Alone Season 7 Episode 11 (History) English Subtitle

entry.content:
Alone Season 7 Episode 11
Click Here : [[ ]]
Storyline :
With only three survivalists left, the million-dollar challenge comes to an end. The participants face off against below zero temperatures, injury and their own mental demons as they fight to make it to day 100 and win the million-dollar prize.
Genre: Reality
Network : History

entry.title: Athi River traders protest over alleged harassment by their county govt

link.title: Athi River traders protest over alleged harassment by their county govt

entry.content: Athi River traders are protesting against Machakos County government over alleged harassment and arrests of businessmen who haven’t renewed their 2019/2020 single business permits.
entry.summary: Athi River traders are protesting against Machakos County government over alleged harassment and arrests of businessmen who haven’t renewed their 2019/2020 single business permits.

entry.title: 【再配信】みちるのお世話様 第108回＜アゼルバイジャンのワインの夕べ＞

link.title: 【再配信】みちるのお世話様 第108回＜アゼルバイジャンのワインの夕べ＞

entry.content:
※8月11日に公開しました動画に不具合がありましたので再編集して再配信いたします。
【はじめに】
ことに大和家のイベントは新型コロナウィルス感染症拡大防止の観点から、新北海道スタイルを実践し、手指消毒はもちろんのことお客様の席はソーシャルディスタンスを考慮した配置とし、透明アクリル板による飛沫拡散防止等を行っております。
ことに大和家の女将による北海道日本ハムファイターズ応援、そして琴似を中心とした街の活性化等、いろいろなことを独断で発信する「みちるのお世話様」。
今回はことに大和家で2020年8月6日に開催された大和家ワイン会「アゼルバイジャンのワインの夕べ」～世界最古のワインを味わいませんか～をダイジェストでご紹介いたします。
ご紹介したアゼルバイジャンワインはビックカメラで購入できます。
単行本 発売中！
「アゼルバイジャンが今、面白い理由」谷口 洋和＆アリベイ・マムマドフ (著)
【提供・協賛】
ことに大和家
札幌市西区琴似2条5丁目
TEL 011-621-8108
entry.summary: ※8月11日に公開しました動画に不具合がありましたので再編集して再配信いたします。 【はじめに】 ことに大和家のイベントは新型コロナウィルス感染症拡大防止の観点から、新北海道スタイルを実践し、手指消毒はもちろんのことお客様の席はソーシャルディスタンスを考慮した配置とし、透明アクリル板による飛沫拡散防止等を行っております。 ことに大和家の女将による北海道日本ハムファイターズ応援、そして琴似を中心とした街の活性化等、いろいろなことを独断で発信する「みちるのお世話様」。 今回はことに大和家で2020年8月6日に開催された大和家ワイン会「アゼルバイジャンのワインの夕べ」～世界最古のワインを味わいませんか～をダイジェストでご紹介いたします。 ご紹介したアゼルバイジャンワインはビックカメラで購入できます。 単行本 発売中！ 「アゼルバイジャンが今、面白い理由」谷口 洋和＆アリベイ・マムマドフ (著) 【提供・協賛】 ことに大和家 札幌市西区琴似2条5丁目 TEL 011-621-8108

entry.title: The Batman Film 2021 - Avec Robert Pattinson le vampire de la saga Twilight qui se prend pour une chauve-souris masquée

link.title: The Batman Film 2021 - Avec Robert Pattinson le vampire de la saga Twilight qui se prend pour une chauve-souris masquée

entry.content:
Warner Bros. Pictures présente THE BATMAN de Matt Reeves (la saga LA PLANÈTE DE SINGES), avec Robert Pattinson (TENET, THE LIGHTHOUSE, GOOD TIME) dans le rôle de Batman, alias le milliardaire Bruce Wayne, qui veille sur Gotham City.
Le casting réunit aussi Zoë Kravitz (LES ANIMAUX FANTASTIQUES : LES CRIMES DE GRINDELWALD, MAD MAX: FURY ROAD) dans le rôle de Selina Kyle, Paul Dano (LOVE & MERCY, 12 YEARS A SLAVE) dans celui d’Edward Nashton, Jeffrey Wright (la saga HUNGER GAMES) dans celui de James Gordon, du Gotham City Police Department, John Turturro (la saga TRANSFORMERS) dans celui de Carmine Falcone, Peter Sarsgaard (LES SEPT MERCENAIRES, STRICTLY CRIMINAL) dans celui du procureur général de Gotham Gil Colson, Barry Keoghan (DUNKERQUE) dans celui de l’officier Stanley Merkel, Jayme Lawson (FAREWELL AMOR) dans celui de la candidate aux municipales Bella Reál, Andy Serkis (la saga LA PLANÈTE DES SINGES, BLACK PANTHER) dans celui d’Alfred et Colin Farrell (LES ANIMAUX FANTASTIQUES, DUMBO) dans celui d’Oswald Cobblepot.
Le scénario de THE BATMAN est signé Matt Reeves & Peter Craig. Reeves et Dylan Clark (la saga LA PLANÈTE DES SINGES) sont producteurs du film, tandis que Simon Emanuel, Michael E. Uslan, Walter Hamada et Chantal Nong Vo en assurent la production exécutive. Le réalisateur s’est entouré du directeur de la photo cité à l’Oscar Greig Fraser (LION, DUNE), du chef-décorateur James Chinlund avec qui il a déjà collaboré sur LA PLANÈTE DES SINGES, des chefs-monteurs William Hoy (la saga LA PLANÈTE DES SINGES) et Tyler Nelson (REMEMORY), du superviseur effets visuels oscarisé Dan Lemmon (LE LIVRE DE LA JUNGLE), du superviseur effets spéciaux cité à l’Oscar Dominic Tuohy (1917, STAR WARS : L’ASCENSION DE SKYWALKER), du mixeur son cité à l’Oscar Stuart Wilson (1917, la saga STAR WARS), de la chef-costumière oscarisée Jacqueline Durran (1917, LES FILLES DU DOCTEUR MARCH, ANNA KARENINE) et des chefs-costumiers Glyn Dillon (la saga STAR WARS) et David Crossman (1917, la saga STAR WARS), de la chef-coiffeuse Zoe Tahir (MOURIR PEUT ATTENDRE, 007-SPECTRE) et de la chef-maquilleuse citée à l’Oscar Naomi Donne (1917).
Le personnage de Batman a été créé par Bob Kane et Bill Finger. Inspiré des personnages DC Comics, THE BATMAN sortira au cinéma le 1er octobre 2021 et sera distribué en 2D, en 3D et en IMAX dans le monde entier par Warner Bros. Pictures
entry.summary: Warner Bros. Pictures présente THE BATMAN de Matt Reeves (la saga LA PLANÈTE DE SINGES), avec Robert Pattinson (TENET, THE LIGHTHOUSE, GOOD TIME) dans le rôle de Batman, alias le milliardaire Bruce Wayne, qui veille sur Gotham City. Le casting réunit aussi Zoë Kravitz (LES ANIMAUX FANTASTIQUES : LES CRIMES DE GRINDELWALD, MAD MAX: FURY ROAD) dans le rôle de Selina Kyle, Paul Dano (LOVE & MERCY, 12 YEARS A SLAVE) dans celui d’Edward Nashton, Jeffrey Wright (la saga HUNGER GAMES) dans celui de James Gordon, du Gotham City Police Department, John Turturro (la saga TRANSFORMERS) dans celui de Carmine Falcone, Peter Sarsgaard (LES SEPT MERCENAIRES, STRICTLY CRIMINAL) dans celui du procureur général de Gotham Gil Colson, Barry Keoghan (DUNKERQUE) dans celui de l’officier Stanley Merkel, Jayme Lawson (FAREWELL AMOR) dans celui de la candidate aux municipales Bella Reál, Andy Serkis (la saga LA PLANÈTE DES SINGES, BLACK PANTHER) dans celui d’Alfred et Colin Farrell (LES ANIMAUX FANTASTIQUES, DUMBO) dans celui d’Oswald Cobblepot. Le scénario de THE BATMAN est signé Matt Reeves & Peter Craig. Reeves et Dylan Clark (la saga LA PLANÈTE DES SINGES) sont producteurs du film, tandis que Simon Emanuel, Michael E. Uslan, Walter Hamada et Chantal Nong Vo en assurent la production exécutive. Le réalisateur s’est entouré du directeur de la photo cité à l’Oscar Greig Fraser (LION, DUNE), du chef-décorateur James Chinlund avec qui il a déjà collaboré sur LA PLANÈTE DES SINGES, des chefs-monteurs William Hoy (la saga LA PLANÈTE DES SINGES) et Tyler Nelson (REMEMORY), du superviseur effets visuels oscarisé Dan Lemmon (LE LIVRE DE LA JUNGLE), du superviseur effets spéciaux cité à l’Oscar Dominic Tuohy (1917, STAR WARS : L’ASCENSION DE SKYWALKER), du mixeur son cité à l’Oscar Stuart Wilson (1917, la saga STAR WARS), de la chef-costumière oscarisée Jacqueline Durran (1917, LES FILLES DU DOCTEUR MARCH, ANNA KARENINE) et des chefs-costumiers Glyn Dillon (la saga STAR WARS) et David Crossman (1917, la saga STAR WARS), de la chef-coiffeuse Zoe Tahir (MOURIR PEUT ATTENDRE, 007-SPECTRE) et de la chef-maquilleuse citée à l’Oscar Naomi Donne (1917). Le personnage de Batman a été créé par Bob Kane et Bill Finger. Inspiré des personnages DC Comics, THE BATMAN sortira au cinéma le 1er octobre 2021 et sera distribué en 2D, en 3D et en IMAX dans le monde entier par Warner Bros. Pictures

entry.title: MORTAL Official Trailer (2020) Nat Wolff Fantasy Super Hero Movie vost

link.title: MORTAL Official Trailer (2020) Nat Wolff Fantasy Super Hero Movie vost

entry.content:
MORTAL Official Trailer (2020) Fantasy Horror
PLOT: Fantasy adventure origin story about a young man discovering he has God-like powers based on ancient Norwegian mythology.
CAST: Nat Wolff, Priyanka Bose, Arthur Hakalahti
DIRECTOR: André Øvredal
entry.summary: MORTAL Official Trailer (2020) Fantasy Horror PLOT: Fantasy adventure origin story about a young man discovering he has God-like powers based on ancient Norwegian mythology. CAST: Nat Wolff, Priyanka Bose, Arthur Hakalahti DIRECTOR: André Øvredal

entry.title: Om Nom Stories - Season 05 - All episodes in a row - Funny cartoons for kids

link.title: Om Nom Stories - Season 05 - All episodes in a row - Funny cartoons for kids

entry.content:
SUBSCRIBE: – Kedoo Animations is the place of the most amazing short animations & toons from studios worldwide!
Join Om Nom in the amazing journey around the world, where he tastes the national sweets and meets many new friends! Try to guess all the countries Om Nom visits this Season!
See also:
All episodes of Booba ►
Adventure of Om Nom ►
Cartoons for kids Musti ►
New episodes of Oko and Lele ►
Most popular episodes of Beo n Peno ►
Join us and enjoy our funny cartoons for babies and kids.
New series and episodes every week!
Get Social with Kedoo Animations:
Like us on Facebook ►
Follow us on Twitter ►
entry.summary: SUBSCRIBE: – Kedoo Animations is the place of the most amazing short animations & toons from studios worldwide! Join Om Nom in the amazing journey around the world, where he tastes the national sweets and meets many new friends! Try to guess all the countries Om Nom visits this Season! See also: All episodes of Booba ► Adventure of Om Nom ► Cartoons for kids Musti ► New episodes of Oko and Lele ► Most popular episodes of Beo n Peno ► Join us and enjoy our funny cartoons for babies and kids. New series and episodes every week! Get Social with Kedoo Animations: Like us on Facebook ► Follow us on Twitter ►

entry.title: MG Pre-Owned Car Business Unit ‘MG Reassure’ Launched In India

link.title: MG Pre-Owned Car Business Unit ‘MG Reassure’ Launched In India

entry.content: MG Motor has introduced its pre-owned car business unit ‘MG Reassure’ in the country. The MG Reassure business ensures customers get the best resale value for their MG cars. The vehicles undergo an extensive inspection process along with all the repairs to ensure the best residual value. Watch the video to find out more about the MG pre-owned car program in India.
entry.summary: MG Motor has introduced its pre-owned car business unit ‘MG Reassure’ in the country. The MG Reassure business ensures customers get the best resale value for their MG cars. The vehicles undergo an extensive inspection process along with all the repairs to ensure the best residual value. Watch the video to find out more about the MG pre-owned car program in India.
